name: No. Ki Units (Passive Regen.)
tooltip: The number of passively generated Ki units.

name: No. Ki Units (Guard Crush Recovery)
tooltip: The number of Ki units generated during recovery from a Guard Crush.

name: Active Ki Regen. Speed (KU/s)
tooltip: The number of Ki units per second generated when charging Ki with L3.

name: Underwater Ki Regen. Speed (KU/s)
tooltip: The number of Ki units per second generated when charging Ki with L3 underwater.

name: Passive Ki Regen. Speed (KU/s)
tooltip: The number of passively generated Ki units per second.

name: Guard Crush Recovery Speed (KU/s)
tooltip: The number of Ki units per second generated when recovering from a Guard Crush.

name: Blast Stock Regen. Speed (BSU/s)
tooltip: The number of Blast Stock units generated every second.

name: No. Ki Units (Quick Recovery)
tooltip: The number of Ki bars drained after quickly recovering from a Smash Attack.

name: Auto-Counter Ki Drain Speed (KU/s)
tooltip: The number of Ki units per second subtracted when performing an Auto-Counter.

name: MAX Power Mode Ki Charge Duration (s)
tooltip: The duration (in seconds) of charging up to MAX Power Mode.

name: MAX Power Mode Duration (s)
tooltip: The duration (in seconds) of "blue Ki" during or before MAX Power Mode.

name: Smash Attack Knockback Duration (s)
tooltip: The duration (in seconds) of the knockback received from an enemy Smash Attack.

name: Full Switch Stock Fill Duration (s)
tooltip: The time (in seconds) required to fill up the Switch Stock from empty to full.

name: Momentum Ratio (Side Step)
tooltip: A coefficient that can make side stepping end sooner. Recommended Values: 0-1.

name: Momentum Ratio (Back Step)
tooltip: A coefficient that can make back stepping end sooner. Recommended Values: 0-1.

name: Initial Momentum Multiplier
tooltip: A coefficient that is multiplied by the inverse of the base momentum ratio (1 - ratio).

name: Additional Momentum Multiplier
tooltip: A coefficient that is multiplied by the base momentum ratio (which ranges from 0 to 1).

name: Enemy Damage Multiplier
tooltip: A coefficient that is multipled by the currently dealt damage from an enemy.
